description: Canonical fused SECTOR CONVICTION feed. Fuses sector-rotation (rotation_score, RRG quadrant, ETF-flow-confirm, money-flow) + liquidity-flow backdrop into one per-sector conviction + posture + confluence. Emits data/sector-flow-state.json for deal-scanner/master-ranker/best-setups/bottleneck-boom.

schedule.description: Hourly at :20 (after sector-rotation refresh) to keep the fused sector conviction current
